title: BioForge - Loomborn
body:
![Banner](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/BioForge_Loomborn/BH_BioForge_Loomborn_header.webp)

![Description](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/BioForge_Loomborn/BH_BioForge_Loomborn_description.webp)
---

Unravel the threads of life itself! BioForge: Loomborn introduces a deep, genetics-based silkworm farming system where science meets craftsmanship. Breed and cultivate silkworms with unique genetic attributes — some enhancing string production, others influencing breeding, food consumption and etc.

---

BioForge - Loomborn Mod - Open Source Available

Please note that BioForge - Loomborn is no longer actively under development. However, the mod’s source code and all necessary resources are now available for you to explore, modify, and continue working with. You can access everything you need on GitHub:

🔗 [GitHub Repository](https://github.com/jenki258/BioForge-Loomborn-Code)

Feel free to fork, edit, or fix bugs to make it your own! Just remember to respect the original licensing terms. Enjoy, and happy modding!

---

How to begin

- Get egg from leaves
- Put that egg into silkworm hive
- Put leaves into silkworm hive
- Wait 1200 ticks or 1 minute
- Profit
